ResourceARN.note: When dependent op needs 'ResourceARN' param, use for_each=aws.xray.list_tags_for_resource and set ResourceARN='{{ item.Key }}'

RetrievalToken.note: When dependent op needs 'RetrievalToken' param, use for_each=aws.xray.list_retrieved_traces and set RetrievalToken='{{ item.Spans }}'

StartTime.note: When dependent op needs 'StartTime' param, use for_each=aws.xray.list_retrieved_traces and set StartTime='{{ item.Duration }}'

GetEncryptionConfig.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.EncryptionConfig.*

GetGroup.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.Group.*

GetInsight.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.Insight.*

GetSamplingTargets.note: Multiple list fields — pick primary or emit one per field

GetTraceSegmentDestination.note: Flat emit — access top-level response fields directly
